project.title: NALCN crosslinking experiments by BS3 crosslinker
project.projectDescription: We used BS3 as the crosslinker to identify the crosslinking sites between NALCN and other interacted proteins.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Crosslinking experiments were carried out by incubating NALCN, other protential proteins and BS3, after trypsin digestion, the peptides were injected into LC-MS/MS for data acqusition.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The raw data from Fusion Lumos were converted to mgf files, which were further analyzed by plink software.
